meta.title: Quantum Shield - Protect Your Assets with Quantum-Resistant Cryptography
meta.description: The world's first quantum-resistant crypto bridge combining Dilithium-III and ZK-STARK. Protect today's assets from tomorrow's threats.

hero.subtitle: The world's first quantum-resistant crypto bridge combining Dilithium-III and ZK-STARK. Protect today's assets from tomorrow's threats.

dilithium.title: Dilithium-III Cryptography
dilithium.description: NIST-certified lattice-based digital signatures. Next-generation cryptography that's mathematically resistant to quantum computers.

timelock.title: Time Lock Protection
timelock.description: 24-hour security waiting period. A time buffer to detect and prevent unauthorized access.

zkstark.title: ZK-STARK Verification
zkstark.description: Transparency and verifiability through zero-knowledge proofs. Achieves scalability while maintaining quantum resistance.

selfcustody.title: Self-Custody
selfcustody.description: Only you control your assets. Private keys are generated and stored locally, never sent to servers.

emergency.title: Emergency Recovery
emergency.description: Peace of mind even if you lose your private key. A safety net to recover assets with a 7-day waiting period and bond.

transparency.title: Transparency
transparency.description: All transactions are verifiable on-chain. Open-source and audited smart contracts.

step1.title: Generate Keys
step1.description: Connect your wallet and generate a Dilithium key pair. Private keys are stored only on your device.

step2.title: Lock Assets
step2.description: Lock ETH or ERC-20 tokens in the quantum-resistant vault. Cannot be withdrawn without a Dilithium signature.

step3.title: Safely Unlock
step3.description: Request unlock with Dilithium signature. After 24-hour Time Lock, assets safely return to your wallet.

cta.title: Prepare for the Quantum Era
cta.description: Protect your assets from "harvest now, decrypt later" attacks. Start protecting against future threats today.

footer.description: Digital asset protection for the quantum computing era. Protecting your assets from future threats with NIST-certified cryptography.
